The main objective of QuantERA is to finance outstanding international research projects in QT through transnational calls for proposals.
QuantERA goals in QT developments
QuantERA strives to map and monitor developments in order to provide the research community with a coordinated Europe-wide approach and to ensure effective support for high-quality research in QT.
QuantERA network introduced successful mechanisms to support inclusiveness and greater participation of less represented countries – Widening Countries5 – in the framework of the programme.
QuantERA has set Guidelines in Responsible Research and Innovation in QT7 to favour implementation of RRI in QuantERA funded projects.

Industry stakeholders are actively engaged in the QuantERA calls by funding applied science through one of the topic identified in the QuantERA call for proposals: Applied Quantum Science (AQS), strong collaboration with the Quantum Flagship and recommendations elaborated in the QuantERA Guidance on industry engagement for the public sector6.
Mapping European public policies is one of the main tasks implemented within the framework of QuantERA.
